description: Lock advanced statistics to probability/statistical-inference lineage rather than bookkeeping diffusion.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to the existing nineteenth-century statistical-methods scope.
Probability and statistical inference remain the direct mathematical lineage for regression, correlation, and analytical statistics.
The relationship is mathematical lineage, not a commercial or bookkeeping enabling edge.
The node retains probability and general mathematics; Cavalieri's specific method of indivisibles is not a direct statistical prerequisite.
Bookkeeping should not be restored unless the node is rescoped to accounting tabulation rather than statistical methods.
